title: StudioDash Release Notes
description: Follow the latest StudioDash development milestones, feature updates, private beta progress, and public release announcements.
summary: Stay up to date with the latest StudioDash improvements as the product moves towards private beta and public release.

featureShowcases.heading: Follow StudioDash's Progress
featureShowcases.summary: Keep track of new features, product milestones, and upcoming releases.
featureShowcases.body: StudioDash is evolving rapidly. Release Notes provide a clear history of new features, improvements, integrations, and important announcements as the product moves towards private beta and public availability.
bullets: Follow new features and product improvements.
Track private beta progress and future releases.
See how StudioDash continues to evolve.

image.caption: Every milestone brings StudioDash closer to public release.

sections.heading: Current Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is currently in active development and preparing for a controlled private beta.
As development progresses, this page will highlight important product milestones, new capabilities, and availability updates.

sections.heading: Recent Progress
paragraphs: The StudioDash website now includes dedicated guides covering the dashboard, integrations, analytics, reporting, synchronisation, security, private beta, and supporting documentation.
Development continues to focus on expanding integrations, improving analytics, refining the user experience, and preparing the platform for beta testing.

sections.heading: Current Integrations
paragraphs: StudioDash continues to expand support for developer services including App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Google Search Console, GitHub, and other platforms.
Additional integrations will be announced here as they become available.

sections.heading: Looking Ahead
paragraphs: Future updates will introduce additional integrations, richer reporting, automation, forecasting, intelligent summaries, and other developer-focused improvements.
As new functionality becomes available, this page will provide an overview of what's new together with links to the relevant guides.
